projects.title: Communal Typewriter Journal
projects.description: A cinematic digital journaling web app inspired by vintage typewriters, analog poetry, and dark academia interfaces. Features live sound design, ink ribbon switching, and snapshot exports.

projects.title: Real-Time ASCII Engine
projects.description: A live image-processing engine that transforms webcam frames into dynamic ASCII art through luminance mapping and character rendering.

projects.title: Trip Co
projects.description: An AI-powered itinerary generation app that crafts personalized travel plans based on user preferences, budget, and duration. Currently under active development.

projects.title: UPES fresher video2025
projects.description: A dynamic  student experience edit showcasing the lifestyle and fun at UPES.

projects.title: Dark Cinematic
projects.description: An atmospheric visual narrative with a focus on rhythm, vintage aesthetics, and meticulous color grading.

projects.title: for myself
projects.description: A creative personal birthday video edit.

projects.title: Year 2025
projects.description: A nostalgic video compilation of memories from the year 2025.

projects.title: @life_at_upes Collab
projects.description: My first-year collaboration video with the official UPES Instagram page (@life_at_upes) which helped me reach many talented people at my college.

projects.title: Saharsh Style Edit
projects.description: A cinematic video edit set to audio by Saharsh (a well-known cinematographer), who appreciated, shared, and commented on the work on his socials.

projects.title: UPES Campus Vibe
projects.description: A high-tempo creative edit featuring campus aesthetics and student lifestyle.

projects.title: UPES Student Hub
projects.description: An atmospheric look at the bustling energy and community layout of the UPES campus.

projects.title: Campus Chronicles
projects.description: A visual showcase of daily life and social interactions at UPES.

about.title: Engineering meets cinematography
paragraphs: I'm Aditya Parihar, a BTech CSE student specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning at UPES. I'm passionate about backend architecture, computational logic, and software development.
Alongside engineering, I've worked as Lead Video Editor @life_at_upes and as a freelance editor — blending deep technical knowledge in Java and Computer Vision with professional video production.

testimonial.title: What drives the work
testimonial.quote: I build software the way I edit film — with intention, rhythm, and an obsession for the details that make a system feel alive.
testimonial.author: Aditya Parihar

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.description: Open to collaborations, open-source contributions, and engineering opportunities.
